_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions technology.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who generate and consume data and technical stakeholders who store and process it.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.549), LS-A-002 (LS, cosine: 0.543).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.540). Shared vocabulary: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, collaborate, develop, identify, solutions, technology] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, bridge, business, consume, data, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.857, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (87.2%). "Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions t" and "Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who genera" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.595 > STS 0.540 (gap +0.055). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [stakeholders] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, collaborate, develop, identify, solutions, technology]. WIDAI-only: [ability, bridge, business, consume, data, effective].
